reviews.comment:
Tendrían que poner más empleados y surtidores porque solo uno tienen de cada combustible,siendo que tienen por otro lado para atender y no lo usan .

(Translated by Google)
They would have to hire more employees and pumps because they only have one of each fuel, even though they have another one to serve customers and they don't use it.
